summary: v1beta1 sample YAML files (6 files), kustomization.yaml update, sample_yaml_test.go, migration documentation, and doc updates for examples.md, crd-reference.md, upgrade.md, and index.md. CRD and webhook manifests were already correct from prior milestones. All new v1beta1 sample tests pass. However, updating docs/how-to/examples.md YAML blocks from v1alpha1 to v1beta1 broke the existing api/v1alpha1/doc_yaml_test.go which hardcodes expected apiVersion as v1alpha1.

tests_checklist.item: v1beta1 sample YAML tests exist and pass (api/v1beta1/sample_yaml_test.go)
go vet passes on all packages
All existing tests continue to pass (go test ./...)
Edge cases covered (empty labels, minimal spec)

Sample YAMLs mirror v1alpha1 counterparts correctly

Production sample demonstrates security best practices (SASL, TLS, NetworkPolicy, seccomp)

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible (version bump in samples + docs)

issues_found.title: Existing test regression: TestDocumentationYAMLExamples fails
issues_found.description: The docs/how-to/examples.md YAML blocks were updated from v1alpha1 to v1beta1, but api/v1alpha1/doc_yaml_test.go:136 hardcodes the expected apiVersion as 'memcached.c5c3.io/v1alpha1'. All 7 subtests fail with: apiVersion: got "memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1", want "memcached.c5c3.io/v1alpha1".
issues_found.fix: Update doc_yaml_test.go line 136 to expect 'memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1' since the docs now use v1beta1 as the primary API version. The test validates doc content, and the docs were intentionally updated to v1beta1.

issues_found.title: Review criterion violated: 'All existing tests continue to pass'
issues_found.description: The review criteria explicitly require 'All existing tests continue to pass: go test ./...' but go test ./... fails due to the doc_yaml_test.go regression in api/v1alpha1 package.
issues_found.fix: Same fix as V1-1. Update the expected apiVersion in the doc YAML test to v1beta1.

suggested_improvements: Consider adding a v1beta1/doc_yaml_test.go that validates docs reference v1beta1 apiVersion, mirroring the pattern
Minor: docs/index.md table row padding is inconsistent after the migration guide row was added — purely cosmetic
next_steps: Fix api/v1alpha1/doc_yaml_test.go:136 — change expected apiVersion from 'memcached.c5c3.io/v1alpha1' to 'memcached.c5c3.io/v1beta1'
Run go test ./... to confirm all tests pass after the fix
